entries.value:
SEV-1 payment API saturation
Error rate dropped to 4% by 14:24 UTC, but VIP merchants are still impacted.
Rollback completed at 14:17 UTC.
Status page updated at 14:05 UTC.

Prioritize investigation of VIP merchant-specific issues post-rollback. Verify if impacted merchants share common patterns (account tier, transaction volume, or specific payment methods). Consider targeted rollout of fix or merchant communication strategy while stability is maintained at 4% error rate.
